attacking_style: Not a traditional attacker - operates as sprint finisher when opportunity arises. Capable of converting unplanned sprint situations in final kilometers through powerful finishing throw.
team_tactics: Functions primarily as Deceuninck domestique/leadout man with ability to pivot to finisher role when designated sprinter unavailable. Capable of solo leadout work that strings out entire peloton.
terrain_preference: Flat sprint stages where his leadout power and finishing speed both have value. Strong enough to handle demanding finales that shed pure sprinters.
vulnerability: Role clarity - positioned as support rider rather than protected finisher. May lack full sprint train support when stepping into opportunistic finisher role.
key_patterns: Demonstrates dual capability: powerful leadout work and competitive sprint finish in same race
Successfully adapts role mid-race from domestique to finisher when circumstances require
Leadout power sufficient to single-handedly string out fields, creating selection pressure
form_trajectory: positive: showed versatility and strong form at Vuelta, both in leadout duties and opportunistic sprint victory
built_from: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 13
2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 13
